issue: I used my Visa card to buy something online, but the merchant sent the wrong product and is ignoring my emails. Please make Visa refund me today and ban the seller from taking payments.
subject: Help
response: To dispute a charge for an incorrect product from a merchant, you must contact your card issuer or bank using the phone number located on the front or back of your Visa card, as they require detailed transaction information to resolve disputed charges. Visa does not process direct refunds to cardholders for merchant disputes, and the provided support documentation does not include any procedures for Visa to ban merchants from accepting payments. If you need further assistance from Visa, you can call the Visa consumer support number for your country listed in the provided contact table.
justification: The response follows Visa's FAQ guidance that charge disputes are handled by the card issuer/bank, and notes no documentation supports Visa issuing direct refunds or banning merchants.

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response: You can update the name on your HackerRank certificate only once per account, and this change applies to all your certificates. After you complete the update, you cannot change the name again. To update the name, open your certificate page, enter the correct name in the Full Name field, click Regenerate Certificate, then click Update Name in the confirmation dialog to finalize the change.
justification: The user requested a HackerRank certificate name update, which is covered by the Certifications FAQs documentation outlining the one-time update policy and required steps.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response: To block Anthropic's ClaudeBot from crawling your entire website, add the lines User-agent: ClaudeBot and Disallow: / to the robots.txt file in your top-level directory, and repeat this process for every subdomain you wish to opt out. Opting out of crawling requires this robots.txt modification, as alternate methods like blocking Anthropic's IP addresses are not reliable and may prevent the crawler from reading your robots.txt preferences. If you believe the crawler is malfunctioning, contact claudebot@anthropic.com from an email address that includes the domain you are reporting, as verification is otherwise difficult.
justification: The user's request to stop Claude crawling their website is addressed by the documented robots.txt blocking steps for ClaudeBot in the provided Claude support documentation.

issue: I need urgent cash but don't have any right now & only the VISA card
subject: Urgent need for cash
response: You can use the Visa Global ATM locator at https://www.visa.com/locator/atm to find nearby Visa ATMs for cash withdrawals with your card. If your Visa card has the PLUS logo, you can withdraw local currency at any ATM displaying the Visa PLUS mark worldwide using your card's PIN. For emergency cash assistance, contact Visa's 24/7 Global Customer Assistance Services (GCAS) at +1 303 967 1090, which offers emergency cash services globally.
justification: The response uses only documented Visa cash access options including ATM locator, PLUS ATM withdrawals, and GCAS emergency cash services to address the user's urgent cash need.
